user.title: Wrap OIO bulbs
user.description: Select which OIO bulbs to wrap with the circadian render layer. Each wrapped bulb will appear as a single-axis dimmer; the underlying physical light will be hidden.

abort.no_oio_devices: No OIO bulbs found. Make sure your bulbs are added via Matter and report a Korrus/OIO manufacturer string.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Circadian OIO is already configured. Use the integration's Configure button to change which bulbs are wrapped.

defaults.title: Default schedule & floors
defaults.description: These apply to every wrapped bulb unless a per-bulb override is set. Leave the schedule at its defaults unless you have a reason to change it — lifting the night brightness cap or cooling the night color weakens the circadian effect.

data.min_brightness: Minimum brightness (1-255, raise if the bulb cuts out at low dim)
data.min_cct: Minimum color temperature (K, warmest the bulb can render)

overrides.title: Per-bulb overrides
overrides.description: Pick a bulb to give it its own schedule and floors, different from the global defaults.

device.title: Override for {bulb}
device.description: These values apply to this bulb only. Turn on 'Reset to defaults' to remove the override and follow the global settings again.

data.reset_to_defaults: Reset this bulb to the global defaults
